title: Ethiopian Beef Tibs
description: A rich and indulgent dish featuring beef strips cooked in a flavorful sumac-spiced onion and tomato sauce, served over injera bread.

ingredients.name: 1 1/2 pounds beef strips
ingredients.notes: cut into thin strips, preferably ribeye or sirloin

instructions: Heat 1/4 cup of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1/4 cup of oil and heat over medium heat.
Add the onion and red bell pepper and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
